---
title: "Enrichment Analysis – Final Report (Email)"
author: "Cristy Medina Armijo"
date: "2026-03-18"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    self_contained: true
---

```{r init, include=FALSE}
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))

project_dir <- "C:/Users/kuris/OneDrive/Escritorio/tesis/trancriptoma"
setwd(project_dir)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

pkgs <- c(
  "dplyr","tidyr","stringr","readr","ggplot2","DT","tibble",
  "clusterProfiler","AnnotationDbi","GO.db",
  "KEGGREST"
)
missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing)) stop("Faltan paquetes: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", "))

library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(stringr); library(readr); library(tibble)
library(ggplot2); library(DT)
library(clusterProfiler); library(AnnotationDbi); library(GO.db)
library(KEGGREST)

stopifnot(dir.exists("deseq2_out"), dir.exists("emapper_out"))
```

## Introducción

Este reporte HTML estático incluye, para cada contraste, resultados DESeq2 (tabla), enriquecimiento GO (BP/MF/CC) y KEGG (Pathway y KO) con tablas y dotplots.

```{r config_and_load, include=FALSE}
# Contrastes
contrasts_estado <- c("T_vs_C")
contrasts_exposicion <- c("As_vs_Cr", "Cr_vs_Control", "As_vs_Control")
report_contrasts <- c(contrasts_estado, contrasts_exposicion)

# Inputs
map_file <- "deseq2_out/gene_id_mapping.tsv"
if (!file.exists(map_file)) stop("No existe: ", map_file)
map <- readr::read_tsv(map_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

emapper_file <- list.files(
  "emapper_out",
  pattern = "emapper\\.annotations(\\.bak)?$|\\.annotations(\\.bak)?$",
  full.names = TRUE
)
if (length(emapper_file) == 0) stop("No se encontró eggNOG annotations en emapper_out/")
emapper <- readr::read_tsv(emapper_file[1], comment = "##", show_col_types = FALSE)

deg_files <- list.files("deseq2_out", pattern = "^DEG_.*\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
deg_files <- deg_files[!grepl("_sig_padj", basename(deg_files))]

contrast_name_from_path <- function(p) {
  x <- basename(p)
  x <- sub("^DEG_", "", x)
  x <- sub("\\.tsv$", "", x)
  x
}
names(deg_files) <- vapply(deg_files, contrast_name_from_path, character(1))

missing_deg <- setdiff(report_contrasts, names(deg_files))
if (length(missing_deg) > 0) stop("Faltan DEG_*.tsv para: ", paste(missing_deg, collapse = ", "))
```

```{r term2gene, include=FALSE}
# genes_base
genes_base <- emapper %>%
  dplyr::rename(gene_id = `#query`) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(map %>% dplyr::select(gene_id, pretty_id), by = "gene_id") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(pretty_id = dplyr::coalesce(pretty_id, gene_id))

# GO TERM2GENE
go_term2gene <- genes_base %>%
  dplyr::select(pretty_id, GOs) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(GOs), GOs != "-") %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(GOs, sep = ",") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(GOs = stringr::str_trim(GOs)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(GOs, "^GO:\\d+")) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(term = GOs, gene = pretty_id) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

# KEGG Pathway TERM2GENE
keggpath_term2gene <- genes_base %>%
  dplyr::select(pretty_id, KEGG_Pathway) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(KEGG_Pathway), KEGG_Pathway != "-") %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(KEGG_Pathway, sep = ",") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(KEGG_Pathway = stringr::str_trim(KEGG_Pathway)) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(term = KEGG_Pathway, gene = pretty_id) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

# KEGG KO TERM2GENE
ko_term2gene <- genes_base %>%
  dplyr::select(pretty_id, KEGG_ko) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(KEGG_ko), KEGG_ko != "-") %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(KEGG_ko, sep = ",") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(KEGG_ko = stringr::str_trim(KEGG_ko)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(KEGG_ko, "^K\\d+")) %>%
  dplyr::transmute(term = KEGG_ko, gene = pretty_id) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

# Universos
universe_go <- sort(unique(go_term2gene$gene))
universe_kegg_path <- sort(unique(keggpath_term2gene$gene))
universe_kegg_ko <- sort(unique(ko_term2gene$gene))
```

```{r go_split, include=FALSE}
go_terms <- sort(unique(go_term2gene$term))

ont_vec <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  GO.db::GO.db,
  keys = go_terms,
  columns = c("ONTOLOGY", "TERM"),
  keytype = "GOID"
)

go_term2name <- ont_vec %>%
  dplyr::transmute(term = GOID, description = TERM) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

go_term2ont <- ont_vec %>%
  dplyr::transmute(term = GOID, ontology = ONTOLOGY) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

go_bp_term2gene <- go_term2gene %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(go_term2ont %>% dplyr::filter(ontology == "BP"), by = "term") %>%
  dplyr::select(term, gene)

go_mf_term2gene <- go_term2gene %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(go_term2ont %>% dplyr::filter(ontology == "MF"), by = "term") %>%
  dplyr::select(term, gene)

go_cc_term2gene <- go_term2gene %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(go_term2ont %>% dplyr::filter(ontology == "CC"), by = "term") %>%
  dplyr::select(term, gene)
```

```{r kegg_term2name, include=FALSE}
# Cache para no golpear KEGG en cada render
cache_dir <- file.path("cache")
dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
kegg_cache_file <- file.path(cache_dir, "kegg_term2name.rds")

safe_kegg_get <- function(ids) {
  tryCatch(KEGGREST::keggGet(ids), error = function(e) NULL)
}

build_kegg_term2name <- function(ko_terms, path_terms) {
  batch_size <- 10

  # ---- KO ----
  ko_terms <- sort(unique(ko_terms))
  ko_desc <- rep(NA_character_, length(ko_terms)); names(ko_desc) <- ko_terms
  ko_batches <- split(ko_terms, ceiling(seq_along(ko_terms) / batch_size))

  for (b in ko_batches) {
    res <- safe_kegg_get(b)
    if (is.null(res)) next
    for (x in res) {
      if (is.null(x$ENTRY)) next
      id <- sub("\\s.*$", "", x$ENTRY)
      nm <- x$NAME
      nm <- if (length(nm) > 0) nm[[1]] else NA_character_
      ko_desc[id] <- nm
    }
  }

  ko_term2name <- tibble::tibble(
    term = names(ko_desc),
    description = unname(ko_desc)
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(description = dplyr::if_else(is.na(description) | description == "", term, description))

  # ---- Pathway ----
  path_terms <- sort(unique(path_terms))
  # Solo intentamos resolver IDs tipo map00010 / ko00010; lo demás queda como "term"
  path_ids <- path_terms[stringr::str_detect(path_terms, "^(map|ko)\\d{5}$")]
  path_query <- paste0("path:", path_ids)

  path_desc <- rep(NA_character_, length(path_ids)); names(path_desc) <- path_ids
  path_batches <- split(path_query, ceiling(seq_along(path_query) / batch_size))

  for (b in path_batches) {
    res <- safe_kegg_get(b)
    if (is.null(res)) next
    for (x in res) {
      if (is.null(x$ENTRY)) next
      entry <- sub("\\s.*$", "", x$ENTRY)
      entry <- sub("^path:", "", entry)
      nm <- x$NAME
      nm <- if (length(nm) > 0) nm[[1]] else NA_character_
      path_desc[entry] <- nm
    }
  }

  path_term2name <- tibble::tibble(
    term = path_terms,
    description = dplyr::case_when(
      term %in% names(path_desc) & !is.na(path_desc[term]) & path_desc[term] != "" ~ unname(path_desc[term]),
      TRUE ~ term
    )
  )

  list(ko_term2name = ko_term2name, path_term2name = path_term2name)
}

# Modo tolerante:
# - si existe cache, se usa
# - si no existe cache e internet falla, se crea TERM2NAME básico (Description = term)
if (file.exists(kegg_cache_file)) {
  kegg_names <- readRDS(kegg_cache_file)
} else {
  kegg_names <- build_kegg_term2name(
    ko_terms = unique(ko_term2gene$term),
    path_terms = unique(keggpath_term2gene$term)
  )
  if (is.null(kegg_names) || is.null(kegg_names$ko_term2name) || is.null(kegg_names$path_term2name)) {
    kegg_names <- list(
      ko_term2name = tibble::tibble(term = sort(unique(ko_term2gene$term)), description = sort(unique(ko_term2gene$term))),
      path_term2name = tibble::tibble(term = sort(unique(keggpath_term2gene$term)), description = sort(unique(keggpath_term2gene$term)))
    )
  }
  saveRDS(kegg_names, kegg_cache_file)
}

ko_term2name <- kegg_names$ko_term2name
keggpath_term2name <- kegg_names$path_term2name
```

```{r helpers, include=FALSE}
read_deg_with_pretty <- function(deg_path, map_tbl) {
  readr::read_tsv(deg_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(map_tbl %>% dplyr::select(gene_id, pretty_id), by = "gene_id") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(pretty_id = dplyr::coalesce(pretty_id, gene_id))
}

run_enricher <- function(gene_list, term2gene, term2name = NULL, universe, p_adjust_method = "BH") {
  gene_list <- unique(stats::na.omit(gene_list))
  if (length(gene_list) == 0) return(NULL)

  enr <- clusterProfiler::enricher(
    gene = gene_list,
    universe = universe,
    TERM2GENE = term2gene,
    TERM2NAME = term2name,
    pAdjustMethod = p_adjust_method
  )
  if (is.null(enr) || nrow(as.data.frame(enr)) == 0) return(NULL)
  enr
}

enrich_to_table <- function(enr) {
  if (is.null(enr)) return(dplyr::tibble())
  as.data.frame(enr) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      Term = ID,
      Description = Description,
      GeneRatio = GeneRatio,
      BgRatio = BgRatio,
      pvalue = pvalue,
      padjust = p.adjust,
      count = Count
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(padjust, pvalue, dplyr::desc(count))
}

dt_opts <- function(pageLength = 15) {
  list(
    dom = "Bfrtip",
    pageLength = pageLength,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    buttons = c("csv", "excel"),
    lengthMenu = list(c(10, 15, 25, 50, 100), c("10", "15", "25", "50", "100"))
  )
}

dt_table <- function(df, caption) {
  DT::datatable(df, extensions = "Buttons", options = dt_opts(15), caption = caption, rownames = FALSE)
}

dotplot_or_note <- function(enr, title, show_n = 15) {
  if (is.null(enr)) {
    grid::grid.text(paste0(title, "\n(sin términos enriquecidos)"))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  print(clusterProfiler::dotplot(enr, showCategory = show_n) + ggplot2::ggtitle(title))
}
```

```{r precompute, include=FALSE}
results_by_contrast <- list()

for (cn in report_contrasts) {
  deg <- read_deg_with_pretty(deg_files[[cn]], map) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(padj, dplyr::desc(abs(log2FoldChange)))

  sig_genes <- deg %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::pull(pretty_id) %>%
    unique()

  enr_bp <- run_enricher(sig_genes, go_bp_term2gene, go_term2name, universe = universe_go)
  enr_mf <- run_enricher(sig_genes, go_mf_term2gene, go_term2name, universe = universe_go)
  enr_cc <- run_enricher(sig_genes, go_cc_term2gene, go_term2name, universe = universe_go)

  sig_kegg_path <- intersect(sig_genes, universe_kegg_path)
  sig_kegg_ko <- intersect(sig_genes, universe_kegg_ko)

  enr_kegg_path <- run_enricher(
    sig_kegg_path,
    keggpath_term2gene,
    term2name = keggpath_term2name,
    universe = universe_kegg_path
  )

  enr_kegg_ko <- run_enricher(
    sig_kegg_ko,
    ko_term2gene,
    term2name = ko_term2name,
    universe = universe_kegg_ko
  )

  results_by_contrast[[cn]] <- list(
    deg = deg,
    sig_n = length(sig_genes),
    go_bp = enr_bp, go_mf = enr_mf, go_cc = enr_cc,
    kegg_path = enr_kegg_path,
    kegg_ko = enr_kegg_ko
  )
}
```

# Overall Results — Estado (T_vs_C)

```{r estado_t_vs_c, results='asis'}
cn <- "T_vs_C"
obj <- results_by_contrast[[cn]]

cat("## Differential Expression Analysis — ", cn, "\n\n", sep = "")
cat("**Genes DE significativos (padj < 0.05):** ", obj$sig_n, "\n\n", sep = "")

deg_df <- obj$deg %>% dplyr::select(gene_id, pretty_id, baseMean, log2FoldChange, lfcSE, stat, pvalue, padj)
dt_table(deg_df, caption = paste0("DESeq2 Results: ", cn))

cat("\n\n## Enrichment Analysis — GO BP (", cn, ")\n\n", sep = "")
dt_table(enrich_to_table(obj$go_bp), caption = paste0("GO BP: ", cn))

cat("\n\n## Enrichment Analysis — GO MF (", cn, ")\n\n", sep = "")
dt_table(enrich_to_table(obj$go_mf), caption = paste0("GO MF: ", cn))

cat("\n\n## Enrichment Analysis — GO CC (", cn, ")\n\n", sep = "")
dt_table(enrich_to_table(obj$go_cc), caption = paste0("GO CC: ", cn))

cat("\n\n## Enrichment Analysis — KEGG Pathway (", cn, ")\n\n", sep = "")
dt_table(enrich_to_table(obj$kegg_path), caption = paste0("KEGG Pathway: ", cn))

cat("\n\n## Enrichment Analysis — KEGG KO (", cn, ")\n\n", sep = "")
dt_table(enrich_to_table(obj$kegg_ko), caption = paste0("KEGG KO: ", cn))
```

```{r estado_plots, fig.height=6, fig.width=9}
dotplot_or_note(results_by_contrast[["T_vs_C"]]$go_bp, "Dotplot GO BP — T_vs_C", show_n = 15)
dotplot_or_note(results_by_contrast[["T_vs_C"]]$go_mf, "Dotplot GO MF — T_vs_C", show_n = 15)
dotplot_or_note(results_by_contrast[["T_vs_C"]]$go_cc, "Dotplot GO CC — T_vs_C", show_n = 15)
dotplot_or_note(results_by_contrast[["T_vs_C"]]$kegg_path, "Dotplot KEGG Pathway — T_vs_C", show_n = 15)
dotplot_or_note(results_by_contrast[["T_vs_C"]]$kegg_ko, "Dotplot KEGG KO — T_vs_C", show_n = 15)
```

# Overall Results — Exposición

```{r exposicion_loop, results='asis'}
for (cn in c("As_vs_Cr", "Cr_vs_Control", "As_vs_Control")) {
  obj <- results_by_contrast[[cn]]

  cat("\n\n# Exposición — ", cn, "\n\n", sep = "")

  cat("## Differential Expression Analysis — ", cn, "\n\n", sep = "")
  cat("**Genes DE significativos (padj < 0.05):** ", obj$sig_n, "\n\n", sep = "")

  deg_df <- obj$deg %>% dplyr::select(gene_id, pretty_id, baseMean, log2FoldChange, lfcSE, stat, pvalue, padj)
  print(dt_table(deg_df, caption = paste0("DESeq2 Results: ", cn)))

  cat("\n\n## Enrichment Analysis — GO BP (", cn, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  print(dt_table(enrich_to_table(obj$go_bp), caption = paste0("GO BP: ", cn)))

  cat("\n\n## Enrichment Analysis — GO MF (", cn, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  print(dt_table(enrich_to_table(obj$go_mf), caption = paste0("GO MF: ", cn)))

  cat("\n\n## Enrichment Analysis — GO CC (", cn, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  print(dt_table(enrich_to_table(obj$go_cc), caption = paste0("GO CC: ", cn)))

  cat("\n\n## Enrichment Analysis — KEGG Pathway (", cn, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  print(dt_table(enrich_to_table(obj$kegg_path), caption = paste0("KEGG Pathway: ", cn)))

  cat("\n\n## Enrichment Analysis — KEGG KO (", cn, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  print(dt_table(enrich_to_table(obj$kegg_ko), caption = paste0("KEGG KO: ", cn)))
}
```

```{r exposicion_plots, fig.height=6, fig.width=9}
for (cn in c("As_vs_Cr", "Cr_vs_Control", "As_vs_Control")) {
  obj <- results_by_contrast[[cn]]
  dotplot_or_note(obj$go_bp, paste0("Dotplot GO BP — ", cn), show_n = 15)
  dotplot_or_note(obj$go_mf, paste0("Dotplot GO MF — ", cn), show_n = 15)
  dotplot_or_note(obj$go_cc, paste0("Dotplot GO CC — ", cn), show_n = 15)
  dotplot_or_note(obj$kegg_path, paste0("Dotplot KEGG Pathway — ", cn), show_n = 15)
  dotplot_or_note(obj$kegg_ko, paste0("Dotplot KEGG KO — ", cn), show_n = 15)
}
```
